Name: 5 Yearly Diesel Pump Under 60KW
Description:
5 Yearly Diesel Pump Under 60KW
- Carry out 5 year service on diesel pump as per AS1851-2012
- COMPLETE all monthly, six-monthly and yearly activities
- REPACK pump glands.
- OVERHAUL the following valves in accordance with supplier’s specifications
(a) Circulation-relief valves.
(b) Pressure-relief valves.
(c) Engine cooling valve.
(d) Pressure regulating valve.
- FIT new gland packing and lubricate spindles.
- (b) For ball and butterfly valves, CHECK for leakage and Quote to  replace if necessary.
- Replace engine air filters.
NOTE: The air filter should be marked with install date.
- After completion of testing procedures, RETURN all
equipment to the operational condition.
